case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. VS. ERIK ROZEMA et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ROZEMA, ERIK
